response.justification: Over 20 years of full-stack development with 6+ years in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React); currently at re:cinq as Staff Engineer directly building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling. Strong code-quality focus and mentorship track record. Gaps in explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and relational database depth are minor compared to demonstrated learning velocity and equivalent capabilities.
strengths: 20+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React work matching primary stack
Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly addressing required skill
Proven TDD discipline, mentorship, and ability to learn across diverse technology domains
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned despite extensive Node.js experience
PostgreSQL/MySQL depth not demonstrated; relational database work understated versus MongoDB focus
Security/authentication expertise not explicitly called out in resume
